CONCLUSORY ALLEGATIONS IN 11 ARE INSUFFICIENT. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6C IN FUTURE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-01-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2014 Continued To Apr-02-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Matthew Kracht, Esq of Kronenberg Law (510-254-6750) for BTP Mission Tiffany LLC, Defendant and moving party
Deanna Maxfield, Esq. of Hooshmand Law Group (415-318-5709) for Miguel Sosa, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Argued. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BTP MISSION TIFFANY LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is DENIED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts to support punitive damages re: malice and oppression. Authority or ratification of actions taken/not taken by Sepaher and Baily sufficiently alleged. Order is signed in open court.Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2013 Continued To Feb-19-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Stephanie Foster for Miguel Sosa the moving party/Attorney James Burns by Court Call for BTP Mission Tiffany LLC the opposing party.

After discussion being held in the matter of DEFENDANT BTP MISSION TIFFANY LLC MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT the Tentative ruling stands as follows: GRANTED with 10-day leave to amend for Plaintiffs to allege which officer, director, or managing agent of Defendant was involved in specific wrongful acts/omissions and/or ratified specific wrongful acts/omissions giving rise to request for punitive damages. Conclusory allegations in 11 are insufficient. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Continued To Nov-25-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT BTP MISSION TIFFANY LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
